articles.title: ₹759 crore flashed in an 82-year-old's account: Why pensioners shouldn't ignore such glitches
articles.summary: A routine pension account check in Bihar turned into a shocking moment when an elderly man briefly saw a ₹759 crore balance before it disappeared minutes later.

articles.title: Jio Platforms IPO: Pankaj Pawar named as CEO ahead of planned $4 billion listing
articles.summary: Jio Platforms is seeking to raise about $4 billion (₹37,700 crore), valuing the company at around $137 billion.

articles.title: Rupee back in red! Impact of RBI’s forex boost fades; currency breaches 96 versus dollar on rising crude prices
articles.summary: The rupee has weakened by more than 0.8% so far in the current fiscal year. On Monday, the one-month forward premium on the rupee stood at 3.17%, whereas the one-year forward premium was 2.83%.

articles.title: Mahadev betting app case: ED arrests EBIX Chairman Vikas Garg

articles.title: Bollywood's most expensive way to travel: The private jets behind India's biggest stars
articles.summary: From SRK's Gulfstream G550 worth ₹500 crore to Priyanka's Hawker 800, here are the Bollywood A-listers who travel in ultra-luxurious private jets — and what each one is worth.

articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Will gold prices continue to fall? Check July 14, 2026 outlook
articles.summary: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices will continue to be influenced by developments on the US-Iran conflict front in the near-term, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

articles.title: Honda ZR-V hybrid is coming to India — 22.79 kmpl mileage and ADAS at what price?
articles.summary: Honda ZR-V Hybrid SUV launches in India soon with 22.79 kmpl mileage, 180 hp, Honda Sensing ADAS, 8 airbags and a 12-speaker Bose system. Here's everything you need to know.

articles.title: Police entered woman's bedroom, seized phone illegally: Bombay HC calls it 'serious invasion of privacy'
articles.summary: The court directed the Maharashtra government to pay ₹10,000 as compensation to the petitioner and allowed the State to recover the amount from the police officer responsible for the violation

articles.title: Quote of the Day by KM Birla: ‘First create jobs, and then...’
articles.summary: Kumar Mangalam Birla (born June 14, 1967) is a prominent Indian industrialist and the Chairman of the Aditya Birla Group, a $67 billion multinational conglomerate.

articles.title: HCLTech to up AI game, invest 3,500 crore in data centres of up to 50 MW
articles.summary: HCLTech plans a significant investment in new AI data centers. This move targets growing demand for sovereign AI infrastructure. The company reported its first-quarter revenue figures on Monday. Revenue saw a slight sequential decrease but a year-over-year increase.

articles.title: Supreme Court appoints ex-judge Rao to mediate Kalyani family feud
articles.summary: The Supreme Court appointed a retired judge to mediate a family dispute. This mediation concerns over one lakh crore rupees in assets between Baba Kalyani and his sister. The court gave the parties two weeks to attempt a settlement.

articles.title: At 45 and 21, this mother-son duo graduated together from IIT Madras. Here's their story
articles.summary: Jigisha had taught electronics at an engineering college in Bharuch, Gujarat, for 16 years before leaving her job in 2019 because of family responsibilities.

articles.title: Sitharaman tells banks: Devise ways to sustain foreign currency deposits
articles.summary: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman urged banks to enhance outreach to Non-Resident Indians. She called for introducing innovative deposit products to sustain foreign currency deposit momentum. Banks reported significant interest from NRIs in several key global locations.

articles.title: Supreme Court upholds Sebi action against Kotak AMC, MD & other executives
articles.summary: The Supreme Court upheld SEBI's action against Kotak Mahindra Asset Management Company. Senior executives, including Nilesh Shah, faced penalties for mutual fund rule violations. The court rejected the defense that investors did not suffer any financial losses.

articles.title: Retail inflation goes past 4%, first time in 17 months
articles.summary: Retail inflation rose to 4.4% in June, crossing the 4% mark. Food prices accelerated, and fuel price hikes contributed to this increase. Restaurants and accommodation services saw inflation rise to 6.9 percent.

articles.title: India's trade deficit hits 5-month high as imports surge
articles.summary: India's trade deficit reached a five-month high as imports surged significantly. Exports showed continued growth, but were overshadowed by increased import costs. Crude oil and fertilizer imports saw substantial year-on-year expansion in June.

articles.title: 'Framework deal ready for India-US trade pact'
articles.summary: India and the United States are making good progress on their bilateral trade deal. A framework agreement for the trade pact is now ready for signing. Both nations have reaffirmed their commitment to a balanced and commercially meaningful agreement.

articles.title: Renewable energy boost: Aditya Birla Group to buy Shell-backed Sprng Energy; deal worth $1.8 billion
articles.summary: The acquisition will bring nearly 5 gigawatt-peak (GWp) of contracted renewable energy capacity into ABRen's portfolio, comprising around 3.3 GWp of operational projects and another 1.7 GWp currently under construction.

articles.title: ED attaches ₹941 crore assets linked to EBIX Chairman Vikas Garg as Mahadev case seizures touch ₹3,800 crore
articles.summary: The cases involve allegations of criminal conspiracy, cheating and forgery.

articles.title: Why Dubai's housing market slowed in 2026; sales fell 16%, prices dipped by 7%
articles.summary: Dubai's residential property sales saw a sixteen percent decrease in early 2026. This slowdown occurred as regional geopolitical tensions impacted buyer sentiment and demand. Despite this, sales remained fifteen percent higher than in the first half of 2024.

articles.title: Donald Trump announces 20% toll on ships in Strait of Hormuz; to ‘reinstate’ Iran blockade
articles.summary: Trump's announcement comes after another major exchange of fire cast fresh uncertainty over efforts to negotiate an end to the conflict.

articles.title: Tata Capital joins the gold loan rush. What’s driving the frenzy?
articles.summary: India’s gold loan industry has tripled in size in three years, with assets under management rising from ₹6.3 lakh crore in March 2023 to ₹19.4 lakh crore in March 2026.

articles.title: SBI Research sees FY27 inflation averaging 5%; says stable rupee crucial as imported inflation rises
articles.summary: In its latest Ecowrap report released on July 13, SBI Research said headline Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rose by 45 basis points from 3.93% in May to 4.38% in June, driven largely by higher food prices and a sharp increase in transport and services inflation.

articles.title: ‘To be signed at right time’: India-US trade deal framework ‘ready’, says official
articles.summary: India-US trade deal: India is seeking a tariff structure under the proposed agreement that provides it with a comparative advantage over competing countries.

articles.title: 'Set Your AC to 78°F': Mayor Joharan Mamdani's plea to protect power supply during heatwave
articles.summary: As temperatures soar toward triple digits, Mayor Mamdani is asking New Yorkers to set their ACs to 78°F, dim lights and unplug unused devices so the strained grid can keep everyone—especially children, seniors and those with health conditions—safe and cool.

articles.title: Best AI phones under ₹30,000 in India 2026: Motorola, Samsung, Realme, OnePlus and Vivo compared
articles.summary: Motorola Edge 70, Samsung M47, Realme P4 Power, OnePlus N6 and Vivo T5x bring real AI features under ₹30,000. Here's which AI smartphone is worth buying in India in 2026.

articles.title: $200 more, three months wait, one new camera feature: Is the iPhone 18 Pro actually worth it?
articles.summary: Reddit says buy the iPhone 17 Pro now — the 18 Pro is incremental and likely $200 more. But if photography is your priority, the variable aperture camera might be worth the wait.

articles.title: India-US negotiations on trade deal progressing well, framework deal is ready: Commerce Secretary
articles.summary: Does not see any challenges to the proposed bilateral trade agreement; will sign at the right time

articles.title: The world's 10 biggest cities by population are out — two Indian cities make the top four
articles.summary: Shanghai remains the world's most populous city in 2026 with an estimated population of 24.72 million, followed by Delhi at 23.39 million

articles.title: Crude oil, electronics and gems and jewellery top three imports adding to trade deficit
articles.summary: India's goods trade deficit in June 2026 widened to $30.43 billion, and exports to the Middle East recovered

articles.summary: The WedMeGood Destination Wedding Report 2026 report reveals that destination wedding spending has risen 8% year-on-year, with the average domestic destination wedding budget now reaching ₹58 lakh while international celebrations command an even steeper invest…

articles.title: Retail inflation jumps to 4.38% in June, driven by food, jewellery prices; breaches RBI's 4% target
articles.summary: India's retail inflation increased to 4.38 percent in June from May's 3.93 percent. Higher food prices significantly pushed up the overall Consumer Price Index for the month. Ginger and tomatoes saw substantial year-on-year price increases, contributing to the overall rise.

articles.title: ITR filing: 10 penalties taxpayers should not ignore - from late filing fee to under-reporting defaults

articles.title: India's commerce portfolio: Imports outpace exports, trade deficit expands to $30.4 billion
articles.summary: India's merchandise imports surged thirty-one percent year-on-year in June. Exports also rose fifteen point five percent, while imports climbed sharply. The country's trade deficit stood at thirty point four three billion dollars for the month.
